---
title: "Executive Summary"
format: html
---

## Key Findings

The 2026 inventory of Rittenhouse and Redd Parks documents the current state of significant trees in these locations.

### Tree Demographics
* The inventory captures trees of varying ages and health statuses across the two parks.
* Detailed measurements of height, diameter, and canopy spread have been recorded for analysis and management planning.

### Health & Condition
* Trees were assessed for visual condition indicators including rot, structural damage, and overall vitality.
* Condition ratings provide a baseline for future monitoring and maintenance prioritization.

---

## Data Overview

This inventory provides park managers with detailed information to support:

* Long-term urban forestry planning
* Risk assessment and maintenance prioritization
* Tracking of tree health trends over time
* Coordination with park development projects
